title: Design By Violet Cosy Christmas Wishes Medium Gift Bag – Bright Red Design with Gingerbread Characters and Ribbon Handle – Great for Books, Toys & Small Gifts
features: MEDIUM GIFT BAG – Handy size measuring 25 cm x 21.5 cm x 10 cm – ideal for books, candles, accessories or sweet treats
COSY FESTIVE DESIGN – Features smiling gingerbread characters, a green mug of marshmallows and “Cosy Christmas Wishes” text
STURDY CONSTRUCTION – Made from strong card with reinforced sides and base for secure carrying and neat presentation
RIBBON HANDLE & TAG – Bright red ribbon handle for a cheerful finish plus a matching gingerbread-shaped tag for your message
EASY WRAP OPTION – A quick, reusable solution that saves time compared to traditional wrapping paper
description: Create a warm and cheerful presentation for your presents with this Design By Violet Cosy Christmas Wishes gift bag. Featuring a festive red background with smiling gingerbread characters, a steaming green mug filled with marshmallows and the words “Cosy Christmas Wishes,” this design is brimming with seasonal charm. The side panels feature a cute repeating gingerbread pattern that completes the look. Made from durable card with reinforced sides and base, this bag is sturdy enough to hold a variety of items including clothing, toys, books and games. The bright red ribbon handle makes it easy to carry, while the matching gingerbread-shaped gift tag provides space to write a personal message. Reusable and easy to use, this bag is a great alternative to wrapping paper – just pop in your present, add your message and you’re ready to go. A fun and festive way to make your Christmas gifting extra special.
